Package jpa.dto.concert

Record Class ResponseOrganizerConcertStatsDto

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
jpa.dto.concert.ResponseOrganizerConcertStatsDto
public record ResponseOrganizerConcertStatsDto(Instant generatedAt, ResponseOrganizerConcertStatsDto.Period period, ResponseOrganizerConcertStatsDto.Overview overview, ResponseOrganizerConcertStatsDto.OverviewDelta overviewVsPreviousPeriod, List<ResponseOrganizerConcertStatsDto.BreakdownItem> statusBreakdown, List<ResponseOrganizerConcertStatsDto.BreakdownItem> cityBreakdown, List<ResponseOrganizerConcertStatsDto.BreakdownItem> placeBreakdown, List<ResponseOrganizerConcertStatsDto.TimelinePoint> timeline, ResponseOrganizerConcertStatsDto.Rankings rankings, List<ResponseOrganizerConcertStatsDto.ConcertItem> concerts) extends Record
Detailed organizer dashboard payload for frontend charts.

    • ResponseOrganizerConcertStatsDto

      public ResponseOrganizerConcertStatsDto(Instant generatedAt, ResponseOrganizerConcertStatsDto.Period period, ResponseOrganizerConcertStatsDto.Overview overview, ResponseOrganizerConcertStatsDto.OverviewDelta overviewVsPreviousPeriod, List<ResponseOrganizerConcertStatsDto.BreakdownItem> statusBreakdown, List<ResponseOrganizerConcertStatsDto.BreakdownItem> cityBreakdown, List<ResponseOrganizerConcertStatsDto.BreakdownItem> placeBreakdown, List<ResponseOrganizerConcertStatsDto.TimelinePoint> timeline, ResponseOrganizerConcertStatsDto.Rankings rankings, List<ResponseOrganizerConcertStatsDto.ConcertItem> concerts)
      Creates an instance of a ResponseOrganizerConcertStatsDto record class.
      Parameters:
      generatedAt - the value for the generatedAt record component
      period - the value for the period record component
      overview - the value for the overview record component
      overviewVsPreviousPeriod - the value for the overviewVsPreviousPeriod record component

      cityBreakdown - the value for the cityBreakdown record component
      placeBreakdown - the value for the placeBreakdown record component
      timeline - the value for the timeline record component
      rankings - the value for the rankings record component
      concerts - the value for the concerts record component

  • Method Details

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object).
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
